Footer.title: Design, intent and development for a presence
Footer.description: Synttek brings visual direction and web execution together to build websites, landing pages and digital experiences with precise aesthetics and a solid technical backbone.

About.manifesto: Synttek is a software development agency built to power brands. We combine strategy, design and code to create digital products that don't just work — they generate real traction, accelerate sales and multiply the productivity of everyone who uses them.
About.differentiator: Every project we take on shares one vision: technology shouldn't be a cost — it should be the most profitable asset your company owns.
About.pillars-heading: Three ways of thinking that define us.
About.pillars-caption: Not wall values. These are the principles behind every decision we make.
About.pillar1-body: Before writing a single line of code, we understand your business, your market and your user. The most elegant software fails if it's built on the wrong assumptions.
About.pillar2-body: Aesthetics aren't decoration — they're persuasion. Every screen, interaction and visual detail is designed to move the user to the next step.
About.pillar3-body: We build for the future of your business, not just the MVP. Clean architecture, maintainable code and technical decisions that won't cost you dearly in 18 months.

Faqs.title: Common Questions
Faqs.question1: Why do I need a website if I already have social media?
Faqs.answer1: A website gives you authority, better Google ranking, full control over your content, and higher conversion rates. It's key for sustainable growth.
Faqs.question2: How long does it take to develop a professional website?
Faqs.answer2: It depends on the project's complexity, but at Synttek, we offer fast and efficient solutions. Standard websites typically take 2 to 4 weeks, while custom developments may take longer.
Faqs.question3: Can you create an online store with WooCommerce for my business?
Faqs.answer3: Absolutely! WooCommerce is one of our specialties. We build intuitive, secure, and optimized online stores to maximize conversions and improve user experience.
Faqs.question4: How do you ensure my website looks good on mobile devices?
Faqs.answer4: We apply responsive design and conduct testing on various devices to ensure an optimal experience on smartphones and tablets.
Faqs.question5: How is the security of my website ensured?
Faqs.answer5: We implement SSL, protection against attacks, regular updates, and backups to keep your site always protected.
Faqs.question6: Can you help me with my company's branding and visual identity?
Faqs.answer6: Yes, and it's one of our strengths. We design strong, modern visual identities aligned with your business values. From logos to brand strategy, we build a professional and memorable image.
Faqs.question7: How do payments and revisions work in a project with Synttek?
Faqs.answer7: Once the quote is approved, we sign a contract detailing the project, including timelines and payment terms. By default, 50% is paid upfront and the remaining 50% upon completion. The agreement includes two rounds of revisions on the defined design to fine-tune details before final delivery.
Faqs.question8: What types of processes can be automated?
Faqs.answer8: Any repetitive task that currently consumes your team's time: lead follow-up, client onboarding, automated reports, CRM and ERP sync, notifications, invoicing and much more. If the process has a pattern, it can be automated.
Faqs.question9: Do I need technical knowledge to use the automations?
Faqs.answer9: No. We design workflows that anyone on the team can operate. We deliver clear documentation, a post-launch support period and workflows connected directly to the tools you already use (Notion, Slack, WhatsApp Business, Google Workspace, etc.).
Faqs.question10: What tools do you use for automations, and what about AI?
Faqs.answer10: We use n8n as our main workflow platform, alongside custom APIs and AI services (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini). We can integrate AI agents that answer queries, generate content or make decisions inside your operational flows — no manual intervention required.
Faqs.cta-question: Have a question that's not here?

ServicePages.closingTitle: If you need to improve your digital presence or your operations, start with the right problem.
ServicePages.closingBody: Tell us what you need to build, what friction you want to remove and what stage your business is in. From there we can define the smartest path.

AboutPage.title: We build digital assets where strategy, design and development stay aligned.
AboutPage.description: Synttek combines visual judgment, technical architecture and commercial focus to design experiences that feel premium, work well and help businesses grow with less improvisation.
AboutPage.sidebarBody: We are not a screen factory or a studio built on visual smoke. We step in when a business needs a more serious digital presence, better conversion or a technical base that can survive real growth.
AboutPage.cardsTitle: Three decisions that support every project we take on.

cards.title: We choose clarity over noise
cards.body: If an interface impresses but does not explain, it is failing. Our aesthetics must elevate perceived value without making comprehension harder.

cards.title: We design for business, not for Dribbble
cards.body: Visual direction matters, but always in service of a business decision: sell better, organize a process or build trust.

cards.title: We build with the next stage in mind
cards.body: The first version matters, but it matters even more that the project can evolve without breaking every time it needs to grow or integrate something new.

ContactPage.title: If the project needs judgment, direction and serious execution, let's talk.
ContactPage.description: This is the best place to tell us what you want to build, what friction you need to remove and what your business needs right now to reach the next digital stage.
signals: Focus on real scope and next steps
ContactPage.cardsTitle: The clearer the context is, the more precise the next step becomes.

cards.title: Tell us the goal
cards.body: You do not need a perfect specification. But it helps to know what you want to improve: presence, sales, inquiries, operations or product.

cards.title: Show us the friction point
cards.body: If something is currently breaking, slowing down or feeling weak, that matters more than any buzzword. That is usually where the right work begins.

cards.title: Clarify timing and context
cards.body: If there are dates, campaigns, launches or a pressing operational need, saying it early helps us set realistic expectations.

ServicesIndexPage.description: We do not sell empty packages. We design, build and connect services that respond to real commercial and operational problems: digital presence, conversion, processes, product and identity.
heroPoints: Web development and landing pages with commercial intent
sidebarPoints: Every service is tied to a real business outcome, not an inflated feature list.
Visual direction and technical implementation are designed as part of the same system.
We connect services so your website, brand and operations do not move in separate directions.
